header.title: Fantasy Story Generator
header.subtitle: Create immersive fantasy worlds with AI-powered storytelling. From epic quests to mystical adventures.
header.meta_title: AI Fantasy Story Generator - Create Epic Fantasy Tales | AIStory
header.meta_description: Generate captivating fantasy stories with AI. Create rich worlds, compelling characters, and epic adventures in high fantasy, xianxia, urban fantasy, and more.

prompt.label: Story Idea
prompt.placeholder: Describe your fantasy story idea... e.g., 'A young prince who cannot use magic must save the kingdom from an ancient dragon'

world_overview.label: World Overview
world_overview.placeholder: Describe the geography, climate, and major civilizations of your world...

factions.label: Major Factions / Powers
factions.placeholder: Describe the empires, kingdoms, guilds, sects, or other major powers...

cost.label: Cost of Magic
cost.placeholder: What price must be paid to use magic? (life force, memories, sanity, lifespan...)

limitations.label: Limitations & Rules
limitations.placeholder: What are the restrictions? (casting conditions, forbidden spells, resource limits...)

name.label: Name / Title
name.placeholder: e.g., Prince Aldric, The Wandering Sage

race_class.label: Race / Class
race_class.placeholder: e.g., Human Mage, Half-Elf Ranger, Dragon-blood Cultivator

background.label: Background & Flaw
background.placeholder: Their origin story and a key weakness or flaw...

goal.label: Goal & Motivation
goal.placeholder: What drives them? What do they seek?

name.label: Name / Title
name.placeholder: e.g., The Shadow King, Elder Vex

motivation.label: Goal & Motivation
motivation.placeholder: What do they want and why?

relationship.label: Relationship to Protagonist
relationship.placeholder: How are they connected to the hero?

main_quest.label: Main Quest / Mission
main_quest.placeholder: e.g., Find the lost artifact, Break the ancient curse, Stop the war...

key_events.label: Key Story Beats
key_events.placeholder: Opening, Turning Point, Midpoint, Climax, Resolution direction...

twists.label: Plot Twists (Optional)
twists.placeholder: e.g., The mentor is the true villain, The kingdom's god is artificial...

ai_models.title: AI Model
ai_models.hint: Choose the AI model for generation

generate_button.tip: Each generation uses 1 credit. Results may vary.

feature_intro.name: feature_intro
feature_intro.label: Overview
feature_intro.title: What is an AI Fantasy Story Generator?
feature_intro.description: This tool turns a rough idea, subgenre, and tone into a readable fantasy draft. Use Quick Mode for fast inspiration or Worldbuilder Mode when you want to shape the setting, magic rules, characters, and quest before the story is written.

image.alt: AI tool for fantasy story creation overview

items.title: From Prompt to Quest
items.description: Start with a single hook and quickly turn it into a fantasy setup with conflict, atmosphere, and direction.

items.title: Worldbuilding With Structure
items.description: Guide the world, factions, magic system, and character goals so the generated story feels more coherent.

items.title: Drafts You Can Expand
items.description: Generate story text, setting notes, character setup, and outline material that you can continue editing elsewhere.

feature_benefits.name: feature_benefits
feature_benefits.label: Benefits
feature_benefits.title: Why use our AI Fantasy Story Generator
feature_benefits.description: Built for writers who need more than random scenes. Control genre flavor, world logic, and character conflict before you generate.

items.title: Subgenre-Aware Generation
items.description: Switch between high fantasy, urban fantasy, xianxia, dark fantasy, steampunk, and more without rewriting your whole prompt.

items.title: World Rules That Shape Plot
items.description: Use the worldbuilder flow to define magic source, costs, limits, factions, and motivations that influence the final story.

items.title: Flexible Output Controls
items.description: Adjust tone, audience, length, and perspective to get anything from a short opening scene to a more structured mid-length draft.

feature_section.name: applications
feature_section.label: Applications
feature_section.title: Applications of the AI Fantasy Story Generator
feature_section.description: Made for storytellers who need fast fantasy material with enough structure to keep writing, pitching, or prototyping.

items.title: Fiction & Web Novel Writers
items.description: Draft openings, chapter ideas, side quests, and arc variations without losing your chosen fantasy tone.

items.title: TRPG & Game Narrative Designers
items.description: Generate quest hooks, faction tensions, magic systems, and character motivations for campaigns or game worlds.

items.title: Roleplay & Content Creators
items.description: Create story seeds for character roleplay, lore posts, short videos, or audience-facing fantasy content.

faq_section.name: faq
faq_section.label: FAQ
faq_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_section.description: Common questions about fantasy story generation, worldbuilding controls, and output quality.

items.title: What fantasy styles can it generate?
items.description: It supports multiple fantasy directions including high fantasy, urban fantasy, eastern fantasy, xianxia, dark fantasy, comedic fantasy, steampunk, and epic fantasy.

items.title: Can I control the worldbuilding details?
items.description: Yes. Worldbuilder Mode lets you define setting, factions, magic source, magic costs, limitations, protagonist details, antagonist motives, and major plot beats.

items.title: Can I use the result as a draft or outline?
items.description: Yes. The generated story, worldview notes, character details, and outline are designed to give you material you can keep editing in your own writing workflow.

items.title: Who should use this fantasy story generator?
items.description: This fantasy story generator works well for novelists, web fiction writers, TRPG designers, and creators who need structured fantasy drafts without starting from a blank page.

items.title: Does it support multiple languages?
items.description: Yes. The tool can generate fantasy stories in multiple interface and output languages so you can work in the language that fits your project.

cta.name: cta
cta.title: Ready to Create Your Fantasy World?
cta.description: Shape your setting, magic, and characters, then turn them into a fantasy draft in minutes.
